title: Amtech I8770 Hex Key Set, 10 Assorted Anti-Rust Hex Keys with Storage Holder, Sizes 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 4, 5, 5.5, 6, 8 and 10mm
features: DURABLE: This 10 piece hex key set has an anti-rust black oxide coating and comes with a plastic storage holder
VERSATILE: The set includes hex key sizes: 1.5mm, 2m, 2.5mm, 3mm, 3.5mm, 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm and 10mm
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 10x Hex Key See more
